productName: Collections - Full Spectrum - Hash Rosin - Gary Payton x Memory Loss - 1g
description: Craft hybrid rosin made the clean way: Gary Payton x Memory Loss squeezed under low-temp pressure to preserve every fragile terpene, full-spectrum and true to the plant. Flavor-forward and full-spectrum, with notes of apricot, pepper, and lavender, leading into a versatile, anytime balance.
